title: HIVE Digital Technologies Q1 FY2025 Earnings Report
text: HIVE Digital Technologies delivered $30.2M in Q1 FY25 revenue (up 28% YoY) and $14.9M in adjusted EBITDA despite Bitcoin halving. HIVE Digital Technologies reported solid financial results for Q1 2025, despite challenges from the recent halving event in Bitcoin mining, which halved the daily Bitcoin production from 900 to 450 coins. The company announced a 100MW green energy expansion in Paraguay and reached a $10M AI revenue run-rate. With a strong balance sheet of over $150 million in Bitcoin, HIVE is equipped for future expansion. The company demonstrated resilience in Q1 2025 despite the Bitcoin halving event impacting mining productivity, with solid revenue growth and improved adjusted EBITDA metrics.
